rules.rule: Introduce defensive pressure only after the player can execute at 80% consistency without pressure.
rules.reason: Adding difficulty before the base skill is solid breaks down technique under match conditions.

rules.rule: Allocate 40% of technical work to the non-dominant side.
rules.reason: Intermediate players have established dominant-foot patterns. Closing the gap now is far easier than at advanced level.

rules.rule: Review footage at 0.5× speed at least once per week.
rules.reason: Intermediate players can begin to self-correct when they see their movement objectively.

rules.rule: Reduce decision time in drills as technical quality improves.
rules.reason: The transition from Intermediate to Advanced is largely about making correct decisions faster.
